# Vendored shell-quote Browser Bundle

- Source package: `shell-quote@1.8.3` from the Node 24 no-publish lock baseline.
- Source files: `index.js`, `parse.js`, and `quote.js` bundled with browserify standalone name `rc16ShellQuote`.
- License: MIT.

This preserves the existing Rancher UI shell parse/quote behavior while removing `ember-browserify` and `npm:shell-quote` from the application build path.
